section_1.title: 1. Controller and scope
section_1.p1: {{company_name_en}} ({{legal_form_en}}) acts as the controller for personal data described in this Privacy Policy.
section_1.p2: This Policy applies to all Humanitec channels: website, web application, integrations, bots and related support communications.
section_1.p3: Controller contact: {{contact_email}}. Data protection contact: {{dpo_email}}. Legal address: {{legal_address_en}}.

section_2.title: 2. Definitions and legal framework
section_2.p1: Personal data means any information relating to an identified or identifiable individual.
section_2.p2: Where applicable, processing is organized with reference to: GDPR/UK GDPR transparency requirements, and Russian Federal Law No. 152-FZ.
section_2.p3: For users in Russia, processing is performed in accordance with Russian personal data legislation.

section_3.title: 3. Categories of data we process
list: Account and profile data: name, email, phone, company role, authentication identifiers.
Service interaction data: requests, prompts, generated outputs, attached files and support messages.
Technical and telemetry data: IP address, user agent, device/browser data, logs and diagnostics.
Payment and billing metadata where paid functionality is used.
Data from connected integrations and external channels authorized by the user or company.

section_4.title: 4. Purposes of processing
list: To provide, operate and secure Humanitec services across channels.
To authenticate users, manage access, and prevent abuse, fraud and security incidents.
To provide customer support and service communications.
To perform billing, accounting and legal compliance obligations.
To improve service quality, reliability and product analytics.
To send product or marketing updates where consent or another lawful basis exists.

section_5.title: 5. Legal bases
list: Contract performance or pre-contract steps (service delivery and account operations).
Legitimate interests (security, abuse prevention, service improvement).
Consent (for optional communications or optional cookies where required).
Compliance with legal obligations (accounting, legal requests, statutory retention).

section_6.title: 6. Recipients and sharing
section_6.p1: We share personal data only when necessary for the purposes above and under appropriate safeguards.
list: Infrastructure and hosting providers: {{cloud_provider}} (region: {{cloud_region}}).
Analytics/monitoring tooling: {{analytics_tools}}.
Billing providers: {{billing_provider}}.
Professional advisors or public authorities when legally required.

section_7.title: 7. International transfers
section_7.p1: If cross-border transfers occur, we rely on legally available transfer mechanisms and apply technical and organizational safeguards proportionate to the transfer risks.

section_8.title: 8. Retention periods
section_8.p1: We retain personal data no longer than required by processing purposes and mandatory legal periods.
list: Logs and technical records: {{retention_logs}}.
Message and interaction history: {{retention_messages}}.
Account and contractual records: {{retention_accounts}}.

section_9.title: 9. Security measures
list: Access control and role-based permissions.
Transport and storage security controls.
Audit logging, monitoring and incident response procedures.
Organizational controls and periodic review of data access.

section_10.title: 10. Data subject rights
section_10.p1: Subject to applicable law, you may request access, rectification, deletion, restriction, objection, withdrawal of consent, and data portability where available.
section_10.p2: To exercise rights, contact {{dpo_email}}. We respond within the timeframes required by applicable law.

section_11.title: 11. Cookies and similar technologies
section_11.p1: We use essential cookies and similar technologies required for core functionality. Additional analytics/marketing cookies are used only where permitted by law and applicable consent settings.

section_12.title: 12. Children
section_12.p1: Services are not intended for individuals under {{min_age}} years old unless otherwise permitted by applicable law.

section_13.title: 13. Policy updates
section_13.p1: We may update this Policy from time to time. The current version is published on this page with the latest update date.

section_14.title: 14. Controller details
list: Company: {{company_name_en}} ({{legal_form_en}}).
Legal address: {{legal_address_en}}.
General contact: {{contact_email}}.
Support: {{support_email}}.
Data protection contact: {{dpo_email}}.
Company identifiers (if applicable): INN {{inn}}, OGRN {{ogrn}}.
